channel.title: Science Terms on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Science Terms on emsenn.net

item.title: Research
item.description: A research is an organized inquiry aimed at producing knowledge. The term names both the activity and its products: a particular research is a study or investigation; research as a practice is the body of activity from which sciences and scholarly disciplines are constituted. What separates a research finding from a guess is not the subject matter but the methodology that governs how the claim was formed, what counts as evidence for it, and how it is made answerable to other inquirers.
